title: rubus subcoreanus
intro: Rubus subcoreanus, also known as the Korean raspberry, is a type of bramble shrub native to East Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus subcoreanus include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Rubus subcoreanus can be prepared as a tea, extract, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Korean medicine to treat a range of ailments.
